title: FathomFPS+
description: Fathomfps+ is a modpack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, and smooths visuals for low-end devices.
body:
# FathomFPS+

_FathomFPS+ makes Minecraft run smoother and respond better on low-end hardware._

FathomFPS+ is a carefully put together modpack that focuses on performance. It includes top optimization mods, memory-friendly resource loaders, and selected visual upgrades. You can enable these depending on whether you want better speed or nicer visuals. Each mod is set up for the best compatibility and requires little setup. Recommended settings are provided to help you get the best performance from your system. Whether you’re playing vanilla survival, building large worlds, or streaming on a modest setup, FathomFPS+ reduces lag, stabilizes frame rates, and shortens load times. This gives you a cleaner and more enjoyable Minecraft experience without being difficult to use.

# Key features :
- Maximized FPS with proven optimization mods and adjusted settings.  
- Memory-friendly resource loaders to reduce stutter and long load times.  
- Optional visual improvements: enable shaders or visual packs only if you want them.  
- Minimal setup; preconfigured for compatibility so you can install and play.  
- Stable gameplay on low-end and mid-range systems.
- **Get 60+ FPS on 1080p On Low End Devices :**
this test was run on a system with an Intel i3-1215U CPU and Intel UHD integrated graphics.Despite having no dedicated GPU, FathomFPS+ delivers 60+ FPS at 1080p resolution, ensuring stable and responsive gameplay on low-end devices.  

![Get 60+ FPS On 1080p On Low End Devices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0540940510cca45ae499257efe44e8208f71ec33.png)

---
Disclaimer: None of the mods in this modpack were created by me. I’ve only configured and bundled them for convenience — all credit goes to their respective creators.
